tableDetails.name: תבניות בוטים לסוחרי אמזון - סלר טולז

formulas.name: Due Status
formulas.formula: IF({Due Date} < TODAY(), "Overdue", IF({Due Date} = TODAY(), "Due Today", "On Track"))

formulas.name: Payment Status
formulas.formula: IF({Status} = "Paid", "✅ Paid", IF({Due Date} < TODAY(), "⚠️ Overdue", "📤 Pending"))

customers.Name: Ben Ginati
customers.Notes: Owner of Tax4Us. Requires 4 agents: WordPress Content, Blog & Posts, Podcast, Social Media. Paid $2,500 for automation services. Premium customer with high automation needs.

customers.Name: Shelly Mizrahi
customers.Notes: Insurance consultant. Requires Excel Family Profile Processor Agent. Processes Hebrew Excel files for family insurance profiles. Standard customer with specific automation needs.

customers.Name: Sarah Cohen
customers.Notes: Referred by Ben Ginati. Interested in legal document automation. High potential for automation services.

customers.Name: David Levy
customers.Notes: Accounting firm looking for automation solutions. Interested in QuickBooks integration and document processing.

projects.Name: Tax4Us Automation System
projects.Description: Complete automation system for Tax4Us including WordPress content, blog posts, podcast production, and social media management. Client: Ben Ginati. Budget: $5,000. Deliverables: WordPress Content Agent, Blog & Posts Agent, Podcast Complete Agent, Social Media Agent.

projects.Name: Shelly Mizrahi Excel Processor
projects.Description: Excel processing automation for family insurance profiles. Processes Hebrew Excel files and generates combined family profiles. Client: Shelly Mizrahi. Budget: $250. Deliverables: Excel Family Profile Processor Agent, Hebrew Text Support, Automated File Processing.

projects.Name: Cohen Legal Document Automation
projects.Description: Legal document automation system for Cohen Legal Services. Includes contract generation, document processing, and client portal integration.
